meta.title: CyberX 2020 Global IOT and ICS Risk Report
meta.description: Dan Shugrue of CyberX presents the key findings from their 2020 Global IOT and ICS Risk Report. And then introduces some broad based suggestions on how to address these risks leveraging some of the guidance from INL's CCE.
